data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that on-call specialists are 'unavailable by default', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this specific requirement. The linked use case describes the need for on-call specialists to be marked as available explicitly, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to this configuration. Therefore, a gap exists in confirming whether this requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of validation for 'Unavailable by default (on-call specialists)'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for on-call specialist availability
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that on-call specialists are not bookable unless marked available.
